  "derive": {"op": "ratio", "numerator_table": 0, "denominator_table": 1},
  "notes": "The AV publishes no average-salary-by-age-and-service exhibit; only Exhibit C (Total Lives and Annual Salaries) provides total salary dollars and counts by age x years of service. I transcribed the 'All Active Participants' (Part III) exhibit on page 35 for both the total annual salary dollars (table 0) and the total lives/counts (table 1), and declared a ratio derive so average = total salary / count. Row buckets: source age bins map to target ages, with '<25' combining 'Under 20' and '20 to 24'; the oldest source bucket is '60 to 63' which maps to target '64'. Target '70' has no source data (top source bucket is 60-63), so it has an empty sources list. Column '4' combines source columns 'Under 1 year' and '1 to 4'. Total row (Total Active) and total column (Annual Salary/Total) were excluded from cells and placed in printed_row_totals/printed_col_totals."
}
